size.description: Size is the size of the OpenSearch instance.

version.description: Version is the major version of OpenSearch, e.g. "2".

openSearch.description: OpenSearch is a map of OpenSearch instances to be created, where the key is the name of the instance.

maxMemoryPolicy.description: MaxMemoryPolicy is the max memory policy of the Valkey instance, e.g. "allkeys-lru".

size.description: Size is the size of the Valkey instance.

valkey.description: Valkey is a map of Valkey instances to be created, where the key is the name of the instance.
